content:
type: SURVEY
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
note: Adding backup=False/backup_suffix='.bak' params to Image.save(). Need to add param handling near top of save() (params.pop) and a shutil.copy2 backup step in the open_fp branch (around 'created = not os.path.exists(filename)') before opening the file for write.

fields.note: Adding backup=False/backup_suffix='.bak' params to Image.save(). Need to add param handling near top of save() (params.pop) and a shutil.copy2 backup step in the open_fp branch (around 'created = not os.path.exists(filename)') before opening the file for write.

fields.region: save() method body (params parsing + open_fp/write block)
fields.note: Both features read/pop new keys from **params (no signature change, consistent with existing save_all/append pattern). backup copies existing file via shutil.copy2 before opening for write; dry_run swaps fp to io.BytesIO and skips real file open/close. I will separately add "import shutil" (non-overlapping) and docstring :param: entries for backup/backup_suffix. Please add your own docstring entries for dry_run separately too.
